declared_goal: Enhance the customer review system with an AI model for automated sentiment detection.
declared_plan: Write a Python script to gather and clean customer reviews data

Launch the model as a cloud service for instant sentiment evaluation
Set up logging and monitoring for maintaining model efficiency and accuracy
Connect the cloud service with the current customer review interface
